meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. Use this advanced SaaS starter kit checklist with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship professional projects at speed.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a friction point, not a barrier. By leveraging a high-performance SaaS starter kit, you transform boilerplate into a production-ready engine. This workflow uses Antigravity for rapid architecture generation and Claude Code to automate implementation, allowing you to ship complex, client-ready SaaS apps in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
The cold reality of freelancing is that clients don't buy potential; they buy proof. When your portfolio is empty, you are invisible in a sea of noise. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-ticket consultant isn't the number of years spent coding—it's the velocity at which they can turn a vague requirement into a functional, revenue-generating SaaS product.

Stop building from `npx create-next-app` every time. You need an industrial-grade starter kit that handles auth, database schemas, and billing as table stakes. We are going to weaponize Antigravity to architect your foundation and deploy Claude Code to execute the heavy lifting, ensuring your portfolio showcases enterprise-grade architecture that commands premium rates.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Blueprint
steps.description: Before writing code, define your core stack (Next.js, Supabase, Stripe) to ensure consistency across all portfolio projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an enterprise-ready SaaS architecture blueprint using Next.js 15, Tailwind, and Supabase. Include modular patterns for authentication, user dashboard, and subscription management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize project structure based on the Antigravity blueprint provided.'

steps.title: Automate Authentication & RBAC
steps.description: Implement secure, role-based access control. This is the first thing clients look for in a professional codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust authentication module using Supabase Auth with Row Level Security (RLS) policies for multi-tenant SaaS data isolation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement RLS policies and auth middleware based on the generated module.'

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Billing Logic
steps.description: Build a reusable billing layer that handles webhooks, subscription tiers, and customer portals—the backbone of any SaaS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a Stripe integration service with TypeScript types, handling checkout sessions and webhook events for SaaS subscription tiers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Configure Stripe webhooks and checkout logic in the /lib/stripe directory.'

steps.title: Rapid UI Component Injection
steps.description: Use your starter kit to inject pre-styled, accessible UI components that look like a million dollars.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a library of reusable Shadcn/UI components tailored for a SaaS dashboard, including data tables, charts, and input forms.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add the generated UI components to the components/ directory and ensure consistent Tailwind styling.'

steps.title: Stress Test and Refactor
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a final audit on your codebase, ensuring clean architecture and optimal performance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review this SaaS codebase for performance bottlenecks and security vulnerabilities. Suggest architectural improvements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Perform a code review and suggest optimizations for database query performance and bundle size.'

pro_tips: Always store your 'Golden Boilerplate' in a private GitHub template repository for one-click deployment.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your auth middleware; clients are impressed by 80%+ test coverage.
Implement an automated 'Demo Mode' toggle in your starter kit to allow clients to test features without creating accounts.
Standardize your database migration scripts so you can spin up a fresh SaaS environment in under 60 seconds.
Focus your portfolio on niche SaaS problems (e.g., HVAC dispatching, dental CRM) rather than generic 'Task Managers'.
content.next_steps: Deploy your first starter kit app to Vercel, record a 60-second Loom walkthrough of the architecture, and add the live link to your LinkedIn profile.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect project to fall into your lap. Create your own momentum by shipping high-value SaaS tools that prove your expertise to high-paying clients. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
